ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING HEARING DATE ON PETITION FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION ON WAIVER OF ACCOUNT AND FOR ITS SETTLEMENT; AND FOR STATUTORY COMPENSATION TO ATTORNEY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Joy, via Zoom, for and with Caryl Brundage, Petitioner.

The court advises of its tentative ruling and confirms that there are no appearances to object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-12-1989 is admitted to probate. Caryl Brundage is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-19-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
